mnemonics: Globally search for text, Print Regular Expressions
Grep: General Purpose Recursive Expression Search
keyPoints: The grep command is used for searching text in files.
It takes two arguments: a pattern and a file name.
The grep command can be used to search for text in multiple files.
The '-v' option is used to invert the search, printing lines that do not match the pattern.
The '-i' option is used to perform case-insensitive searching.
